description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 43 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 4 mins per day. His work was split across 4 projects, with the most time in Python, followed by Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos recorded this week.
